allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add symfony/var-exporter to fix Doctrine LazyGhost error

Doctrine ORM 3.x requires symfony/var-exporter for LazyGhost proxy
generation. Without it, cache:clear fails with
"Symfony LazyGhost is not available".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Add symfony/var-exporter to fix Doctrine LazyGhost error" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Adds `symfony/var-exporter` ^7.1 as explicit dependency
- Fixes `cache:clear` failure caused by missing LazyGhost support in Doctrine ORM 3.x

## Context
Without this package, the application fails with:
```
Symfony LazyGhost is not available. Please install the "symfony/var-exporter" package version 6.4 or 7
```

## Test plan
- [ ] Run `composer install` on the server
- [ ] Verify `cache:clear` completes without errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update doctrine/doctrine-migrations-bundle to 3.7.0

Fixes "Attempted to load class SchemaFilterListener" error during
cache:clear. The class was removed in 3.3.x but reintroduced in 3.4.0
under src/EventListener/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
